character.name:
Small low top-down pixel art dungeon hero based on a futuristic fantasy version of Shah Rukh Khan as G.ONE, athletic Indian male warrior, sharp jawline, intense heroic expression, slightly glowing eyes, sleek dark armored coat with subtle blue energy lines, high-tech fantasy design mixed with dungeon crawler style, dual short blades in both hands, agile stance, commanding lead character silhouette, polished retro RPG sprite, readable silhouette, dramatic torch-lit shading, detailed but clean pixel art, designed for action animations
Outfit should have clear arm separation, visible blades from top-down view, coat not too long, strong readable silhouette for idle, run, attack, dash, and hit animations
